source: Rustad et al. 2025 medRxiv supplement (Table S3 representative lead variant per locus)
source_title: Novel Parkinson's Disease Genetic Risk Factors Within and Across European Populations
selection_rule: For each of the 134 loci, the representative row is the lead variant with the smallest P value in Supplementary Table S3. Table S3 contains 157 independent signals across these 134 loci.
